NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MATTHEW ZIBILICH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. First Amended Complaint filed 5/13/2011. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Off Calendar

Appearances:

A. Evje, Esq. for plaintiff Tenderloin Health.
Tiffany Cheung, Esq., representing the Defendant Matthew Zibilich, through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renee, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505-B, for settlement discussions.

Case settled, the trial date vacated.

Judgment pursuant to stipulation filed in open court.
